code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut start = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if start < i
          let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
        end
        start = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < n
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_pair(_ nums: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<String>
  let n = list.len(nums)
  mut i = 0
  mut answer: Option<String> = None
  while i < n
    match answer
    when Some(_)
      i = n
    when None
      mut j = i + 1
      while j < n
        match answer
        when Some(_)
          j = n
        when None
          match list.get(nums, i)
          when Some(a)
            match list.get(nums, j)
            when Some(b)
              if a + b == t
                answer = Some("found=#{i},#{j}")
              end
            when None
              ()
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  answer
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(l2)
      let nums = parse_ints(l1)
      match string.parse_int(string.trim(l2))
      when Some(t)
        match find_pair(nums, t)
        when Some(msg)
          print(msg)
        when None
          print("none")
        end
      when None
        print("none")
      end
    when None
      print("none")
    end
  when None
    print("none")
  end
end
